free_text: IND = Bangalore University, Bangalore, India
Levels in 38K from the 40Ca(d,alpha) reaction at 22.8
MeV
Target prepared by evaporating calcium enriched in 40Ca
onto a thin carbon film. Target thickness 60
microg/cm**2.
Outgoing alpha particles were simultaneously
detected using a set of four dE/dX-E counter
telescopes separated by 7.5 degree from each other.
Target thickness determined relative to deuteron
elastic scattering around 55 degrees which was
normalized to optical-model calculations.
Specta were analyzed with the peak-fitting computer
program MALIK.
No reply from H.T. Fortune to author proof.
SD + VM
Estimated error
No information on data uncertainties.
Data taken from Table II in reference.
The error bars, where shown, contain
statistical errors and errors due to background
subtraction.
Digitizing error for data 1%, for angles 1.0 degree.
Data scanned at VNIIEF from Figs. 4-7 in
reference.
